mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_rules ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM alert_rules WHERE enabled = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_rules ( name, asset_type, symbol, condition_type, threshold_price, notify_channel, notify_target, enabled, cooldown_minutes, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{assetType}, #{symbol}, #{conditionType}, #{thresholdPrice}, #{notifyChannel}, #{notifyTarget}, #{enabled}, #{cooldownMinutes}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_rules SET name = #{name}, asset_type = #{assetType}, symbol = #{symbol}, condition_type = #{conditionType}, threshold_price = #{thresholdPrice}, notify_channel = #{notifyChannel}, notify_target = #{notifyTarget}, enabled = #{enabled}, cooldown_minutes = #{cooldownMinutes}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
